name: 200 MG Fenofibrate Capsules IP
about: 200 MG Fenofibrate Capsules IP is a general medicine that is used as per the doctors suggestion. It is an effective medication that helps to control cholesterol and triglycerides in the blood. The capsules come in a physical form, making it easy to swallow. The recommended dosage for this medicine is 200mg. This medication is manufactured in India and is available for export, supply, and trade. Store the medication in a cool place to maintain its effectiveness.
